basic_details.job_title: CUK Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Central University of Kerala (CUK) has officially announced the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 with 1 vacancy under Advertisement No. CUK/PLS/PKK/ARG2025/HR-01. Candidates holding an M.Sc. degree in Plant Science, Botany, Genomics, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Molecular Biology, or related disciplines along with a valid CSIR-UGC-NET or GATE qualification are eligible to apply. Applicants must not exceed 28 years of age. Selected candidates will receive a fellowship of Rs. 37,000 plus HRA per month for the first two years and Rs. 42,000 plus HRA per month during the third yea

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: As per Govt. of India rules

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Plant Science/Botany/Genomics/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Molecular Biology, CSIR-UGC-NET/GATE qualification
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Plant Science/Botany/Genomics/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Molecular Biology with CSIR-UGC-NET/GATE qualification. Desirable: Experience in bioinformatics analyses and molecular biology techniques.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CUK Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CUK to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CUK Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CUK Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CUK Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CUK Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CUK to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUK Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Junior Research Fellow position at the Central University of Kerala is 03-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Plant Science/Botany/Genomics/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Molecular Biology and have qualified in CSIR-UGC-NET/GATE.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years, with age relaxation applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow is Rs. 37,000/+HR for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/+HR for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at the Central University of Kerala.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online for the Central University of Kerala Junior Research Fellow recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the CUK Junior Research Fellow application?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Central University of Kerala located?
faq.answer: The Central University of Kerala is located in Kasaragod, Kerala, with the pincode 671325.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CUK/PLS/PKK/ARG2025/HR-01.
